title: Welcome!
text:
Hey! this is Sokmean
Thank you for stopping by! My full name is Sokmean Poch.I was born and raised in Cambodia. I moved to Singapore in 2019 for school. I finished high school in 2024 and right now, I’m a student at St. Olaf College. I’m doing Quantitative Economics and Statistics doubled majors. This is my first time building a website. I am proud because I’m so ready to show it off to my niece, my mama, my dogs, cats and chickens. I’m sure they are proud of me too!
Fun Facts About Me

Data Science only starts to make sense to me at 2am
I shop every time I submit data science’s projects because I truly deserve it ( this one too)
My lashes will be on whenever I’m stressed, the longer the lashes, the harder time I’m going through
All of my friends think that I’m really good at keeping secret but in fact, I just didn’t understand 97.9% of what they’ve been talking about
I love love, and you should too
